abilities.desc: +1 THAC0 with bows and long/short swords

FIGHTER.desc: 10 attacks at -4 THAC0 bonus for 1 round
Instantly slay enemies of 10 HD or less
Instantly slay enemies of 12 HD or less
All hits are critical hits for 1 round
40% resistance to physical damage for 1 round/level
All nearby enemies must save vs. spell or panic for 2 rounds

RANGER.desc: 10 attacks at -4 THAC0 bonus for 1 round
Detect all creatures in the current area
All hits are critical hits for 1 round
40% resistance to physical damage for 1 round/level

PALADIN.desc: 10 attacks at -4 THAC0 bonus for 1 round
All hits are critical hits for 1 round
40% resistance to physical damage for 1 round/level

BARBARIAN.desc: 10 attacks at -4 THAC0 bonus for 1 round
Instantly slay enemies of 10 HD or less
Instantly slay enemies of 12 HD or less
All hits are critical hits for 1 round
40% resistance to physical damage for 1 round/level
All nearby enemies must save vs. spell or panic for 2 rounds

CLERIC.desc: Spinning blades deal damage to nearby enemies
Target must save or be destroyed
Create energy blades to throw as ranged attacks
Call lightning, acid rain, and ice on enemies

DRUID.desc: Spinning blades deal damage to nearby enemies
Create energy blades to throw as ranged attacks
Call lightning, acid rain, and ice on enemies
Surround caster in flames dealing fire damage

THIEF.desc: Ignore all class and alignment restrictions on items
Next backstab automatically hits and is a critical
Set a trap dealing 10d6 fire damage in area
Set a trap that stops time for 3 rounds
Create a scroll of a 7th-level spell
Automatically survive a killing blow once

BARD.desc: Ignore all class and alignment restrictions on items
Improved bard song with better bonuses
Play a tune that confuses and holds enemies
Set a trap dealing 10d6 fire damage in area
Set a trap that stops time for 3 rounds
Create a scroll of a 7th-level spell

MAGE.desc: Create energy blades to throw as ranged attacks
Breathe a cone of fire dealing massive damage
Call down a comet dealing massive damage to one target
Remove casting speed limits for 2 rounds
Absorb the next spell levels that target you

SORCERER.desc: Create energy blades to throw as ranged attacks
Breathe a cone of fire dealing massive damage
Call down a comet dealing massive damage to one target
Remove casting speed limits for 2 rounds
Absorb the next spell levels that target you

MONK.desc: 10 attacks at -4 THAC0 bonus for 1 round
Target must save vs. death or die
40% resistance to physical damage for 1 round/level
All hits are critical hits for 1 round

SHAMAN.desc: Spinning blades deal damage to nearby enemies
Call lightning, acid rain, and ice on enemies

activated.effects: +2 THAC0, +2 damage, -2 AC, +15 HP. Immune to charm, fear, hold, level drain, maze, imprisonment, stun, sleep. Lasts 5 rounds.

passive.desc: Each hit applies cumulative 10% spell failure on target

restrictions.items: No magic items except weapons and armor

activated.effects: All damage dice roll maximum for 1 round.

hlaPool.note: Standard fighter HLA pool. Famously dual-classed to Mage.

passive.desc: +1 THAC0 with ranged weapons per 3 levels
+1 damage with ranged weapons per 3 levels

activated.effects: Next ranged attack applies -1 THAC0 penalty and -1 save penalty to target per 4 levels.

hlaPool.note: Standard ranger HLA pool. Inherited Called Shot HLA.

spellRestrictions.note: Standard ranger spellcasting. No Charm Animal at level 1.

passive.desc: Can backstab up to x3 multiplier

activated.effects: Can cast Haste once per day
Can cast Minor Spell Deflection once per day

spellRestrictions.note: Standard ranger spellcasting. Innate Haste/Minor Spell Deflection.

passive.desc: Immune to fear, charm, and poison

activated.effects: Removes fear from allies in area.

passive.desc: Dispel Magic cast at 2x character level

activated.effects: See through invisibility and illusions for 1 round/level.

spellRestrictions.reason: Inquisitors cannot cast priest spells at all

passive.desc: Immune to hold and level drain

activated.effects: Next hit poisons target for 6 rounds (1 dmg/sec, save vs. death for half).
Set a special snare with bonus effects (slow, stun, hold) that improve with level.

hlaPool.note: Standard thief HLA pool. Specialized in Set Special Snare.

activated.effects: +2 THAC0, +2 damage, +1 APR, +2 AC for 4 rounds.
+1 AC per level (max +10), rooted in place for 4 rounds.

passive.desc: Bard Song gives allies +2 THAC0, +2 damage, +2 AC

spellRestrictions.note: Standard bard spellcasting + enhanced bard song.

activated.effects: Drain 2 HP/level from target, heal self.
Next hit poisons target.

hlaPool.note: Standard paladin HLA pool with evil flavor

activated.effects: 50% physical damage resistance, +2 AC, rooted in place for 5 rounds.
Cone of fire dealing 3d8 damage (increases with level).

spellRestrictions.note: Standard sorcerer spell system. Cannot summon or use familiar.

activated.effects: Teleport to target location within visual range.

hlaPool.note: Shadowdancer-specific HLA table: gains Shadow Form and Shadow Twin, loses Improved Evasion, Set Time Trap, Scribe Scrolls

activated.effects: Ranged fire attack dealing 1d8 damage per 2 levels.
Massive radial fire/undead destruction.
Blinds target on failed save.
Can cast Blur once per day.
Drain HP from target.

spellRestrictions.note: Monk kit, no spellcasting. Innate Blur/Vampiric Touch.

PALADIN.d: Protection from Evil aura, Detect Evil

BARBARIAN.d: Rage, +2 movement speed, -2 AC at high levels

CLERIC.d: Turn Undead, full priest spells, blunt weapons only

DRUID.d: Full priest spells, shapeshifting at high levels

THIEF.d: Backstab x2, 7 thief skills, 30 initial bonus points

BARD.d: Bard Song, Pick Pockets, limited arcane spells
Defensive Spin, Offensive Spin (1/day each at L1)

JESTER.effects: Enemies must save vs. spell or be confused

GENERIC.domain: No specific deity — full priest sphere access
